title: Wick - Aberdeen PSO Procurement Process Launched – Highlands and Islands Airports Limited

sections.heading: What happened
sections.content: Highland Council have launched an emergency tender today to secure a new operator the Wick - Aberdeen PSO service.

sections.heading: Key details
sections.content: An announcement on the new operator is expected to be made next Thursday. Wick - Aberdeen PSO Procurement Process Launched – Highlands and Islands Airports Limited

sections.heading: Why it matters
sections.content: Back to Airports Barra Airport Benbecula Airport Campbeltown Airport Dundee Airport Inverness Airport Islay Airport Kirkwall Airport Stornoway Airport Sumburgh Airport Tiree Airport Wick John O’Groats Airport © 2026 Highlands and Islands Airports Limited. All Rights Reserved.
